title: Weltgewebe domain-scale benchmark fidelity
goal: Make the merged Weltgewebe domain-scale benchmark reproduce production-shaped identifiers, insertion-order time correlation and configuration-bound CI assertions without weakening fixture integrity checks.
completion: Generated node and edge identifiers are deterministic, UUID-v4-shaped and exercise production-representative B-tree ordering.
Generated timestamps progress monotonically across the largest declared profile without periodic month wraparound.
CI row-count assertions derive from the generated manifest rather than duplicated constants.
Manifest validation retains a proven defense against self-consistent file-and-manifest tampering.
The supported host-path contract is explicit and covered by regression tests.

metadata.live_constraint: Implementation must not begin while the active repo-wide Weltgewebe lease for PR #1440 prevents a proven nonconflicting write scope.
does_not_establish: native Windows support unless explicitly selected
permission to remove structural CSV validation solely because a colocated manifest hash matches
